title: Revolutionizing tech Programming Languages
author: Priya
content:
Low Level Languages

Language
Machine language (binary - 0 &1)
Assembly language ( english like pnemonics)

HLL - High Level Language

Language
Fortran , COBOL , basic
Assembly language ( english like pnemonics)
C (1972)

a transformative 1st programming language ,much simpler than other previous language.with the birth of C , all Machine transcoded language used in developing OS , kernal r later translated to C.

Sql (1974)

Query Language in relational db .Major database systems used sql - Oracle , Mysql,SQL server,PostgreSQL , Maria DB,IBM DB2,SQLite ...

CPP (1985)

Evolved from C and is the 1st language based on OOPs.It came up with more enhanced features of class and object, use of new ,delete keywords for object creation and deletion.Designing gaming apps, mobile apps,OS, drivers. Adobe photoshop made through cpp for graphics designining. Backend engines like MySQL and MongoDB are programmed in C++


Modern Internet came in - 1989
Python (1991)

Python is a high level compiled and interpreted language based on OOPs fundamentals.Some of its frameworks -


Django
Flask
FastAPI
Falcon
PHP (1995)
It's a scripting language for web development in the backend.It was 1 of oldest language and is widely used even today. It powers modern web developent with its simplistic commands and query.It was designed using C/C++ and has many of its frameworks which r highly in use today.It can run on most platforms, including Linux, Microsoft Windows, and proprietary platforms such as IBM i. Due to its fast learning curve and range of powerful frameworks, PHP is a go-to choice for both backend and full-stack developers.

Some of common websites uses PHP - Facebook,wikipedia,tumblr,slack,wordpress,shopify,upwork and many more.
Some of its common used frameworks -
Laravel
Codeigniter
Symphony

Java (1995)

It's a multi-threaded ,interpreted high level programming language follows OOPs principle.Various in-built classes,keywords r introduced in Java which drifted developers to move form cpp towards it.It simplifies code by use of advance classes ,interfaces packages together under collection framework.It is used in varied platforms ,across different fields in embedded programming ,applets, in designing desktop,mobile application,in gamings,in web apps for microservices , API development ,AI ,robotics and in various other sectors using card based magnetic strip,in passport and in many other tech fields.


Servlet (1995)
They r the foundation of java web development. Servlet r java classes to handle request -response to and from a web server.When a servlet is called ,its required java class code is executed to implement the backend logic.Here , since html code logics r inserted into java class ,for complex applications having high presentation logic ,mixing html in java made view rendering from java code difficult as there is no separation in presentation and code logics.
As a solution to it later JSP came.

JSP/JPA/Hibernate

JSP (1997)

JSP gives the frontend view for java application.It embed java code in an html file.It allows dynamic content logic for interacting with java backend.JSP is a html page with embedded java blocks.Inserting java code into html made jsp more intuitive for web designing.It simplified web programming by combining strength of java with html tags.In a servlet, designing UI with only html becomes hard when UI is complex and mixing java with html may not give good presentation logic and code may become harder to read and modify for a complex UI design. During runtime , JSP code r compiled into servlet.Java code logics r passed inside out.println() within html tags.

JPA/Hibernate

JPA used at the backend to store java objects into tables of database engine.Uses inbuilt classes and interfaces to map java objects database tables.Uses annotations such as @entity,@table,@id,@query to allows ORM mappings.
Hibernate implemented JPA by doing ORM mappings to store java objects in database.It maps your Java classes directly to database tables and handles the automatic generation of complex SQL commands - insert,select,update.
Struts (2000) It's a java web developemt language based on MVC architecture.It has separate layered architecture for handling buisness logic ,presentation ,data access and query handling, user message handling.It uses servlet and JSP for view handling at the server.Airtel payment bank ,bank of America r some of companies used struts.It is oldest web technology but is still in use as a old legacy framework in some of tech sites.Now modern developmental sites has moved from struts to spring boot which has various simpler,advance code structure to support modern web apps.
Spring MVC (2004) JSP simplified web development logic to some extent but still there is some presentation and backend buisness logics mixing.For complex applications ,mvc is thought to be best preferred architecture for building web application.
With Spring MVC, all presentation and buisness logics r made separately with a service layer combining presentation and buisness logics together to give the actual view.
It uses a dispatcher servlet to handle incoming request,do message routing .Identify the handler method and invoke the handler method to serve the request .Once controller process the request it return a ModelANd View object.Than , ViewResolver maps logical view name to actual view technology to present the view in the UI.
Spring Boot Spring Boot uses Spring MVC to design web apps. It's a component of Java's Spring framework and based on concept of Dependecy injection, IOc principles,use of starter dependencies.It drastically reduced boilerplate code by allowing spring container to manage infrasture,bean lifecycle management and by removing need for reusing of same piece od code with wiring/auto-wiring . It's major applications r in app development through microservice architecture,creating http single use APIs,in enterprise web apps , in data processing in batches.
Companies like - netflix,linkedin,alibaba,JPmorgan,Citi,American express,wix worked on spring boot architecture to build their platforms.
JS (1995)

Javascript is web development programming language based on OOPs.It adds dynamic event handling,click operations and animations on web pages by implemeting certain code logics written as function.98% of websites today r designed today with JS.It is loosely typed, single threaded programming language.It has many of its known frameworks today which have extensive use in web desinging.More than 80 frameworks have been discovered so far.Some of its r -


Javascript Frontend Frameworks
JQuery (2006)

It's a JS frontend library provides a unified ,single line code to implement functions which were earlier used to take long lines of codes.It reduces code complexity,by converting highly densed ,verbose js code into simple impelemented 1 liner methods for DOM manipulation,Ajax request handling,animations and other click driven operations.It works on write less do more principle by writing JS faster by using shorthand for functions and reduce code repetition.

AngularJs(1x) -(2010)

Based on TS framework Developed by Google . SPAs came with it.

ReactJS (2013)

JS library developed by meta . Netflix , insta , Airbnb , Shopify.,fb , whatsapp built on react stack.

Angular (2x,3x, ...(2016))

Angular with 2x was rewritten with oops in typescript as the base model and it has complete different dynamics than 1x. To understand clear flow working with angular start with 2x . Eg.. google cloud console , paypal ,Forbes ,upwork,utube Angular and react r the base of other languages u want to work with. if u r new to working than start with react and develop some solid understanding than move to angular. If u r strong with concepts of oops , java , spring , dependency injection than angular is good to start with . Angular developers have their demands in building of enterprise level applications. React built includes cross platform mobile apps , social media, networking apps , for entertainment , ecommerce or retail apps.

Next.JS(2016)

Built in top of react. it is full stack , server first js framework. It uses react JSX model, where markup and component logic coexist directly inside JavaScript files.
All 3 react , angular , vue r client side rendering frameworks , do execution at the browser's end .Next takes data 1st to server process them and than pass it to browser for further rendering.Code is 1st complied at the server before sending it to browser.
Use angular when u r working in some big , tech heavy corporate system ,like building a complete portal ,In heavy weight application designing. Use Vue when goal is to build some modern , advance web apps , Ecom site. Before beginning with Vue learn some basics from angular to get a better grasp on it . If working on consumer ready website , needs good seo indexing than work with Vue.

Vue (2014)

combines all best features of Angular directives and react html Dom . It provides single file components that can be placed in the form of script in the html file itself to start working with vue.js

JS backend frameworks

Node.js
Express.js
NextJs = it exposes frontend api with http backend support.implemented through 1. Route handlers 2.proxy 3.api routes Route handlers r http endpoint . They r created through route.ts or route.js file..Can return any content type not just html.has async / await support
Backbone, meteor , restify,sails, koa
Go(Golang - 2009)

it has combined features of c,c++,java . Support use of pointers, has default garbage collection mechanism like java, must faster compilation.code much easy to understand more than python. , In designing of simple to advance libraries,jars and binaries that can be used as api or plugin in other software , docker,kubernetes developed from go.It has statically typed nature which allows catching errors at compile time rather than run time.
Go is far better than java ,python and rust due to its concurrency feature of executing multiple task parallely and faster . Java uses threads and executors for parallel processing , go uses go routines library of go runtime which is much faster than java or python in giving good performance for concurrent read and write.
Java uses JVM which convert our code to byte code and than again it is recompiled to convert it to machine code.Go On the other hand directly convert code into machine language and hence is faster in execution.
Paypal, Dropbox ,uber , medium , Netflix, Shopify, cloudflare , hashicorp , ms , google, twitch designed with go.
Much favoured if u r working with AWS lambda as cold start can cause some delay in triggering a function written in any programming languages.so ,here go leads the race due to its faster loading and quick compilation I can produce output much faster than other languages we code with.So, it's good for designing small executable files in lamba environment.

Rust

In CLI , embedded system coding , to rewrite os, kernels, drivers , in designing api and microservices.(code has much similarity with C, CPP),in building web servers,games , allows safe handling of memory ,takes less memory to execute a task than that of other programming languages.

Swift /dart (flutter) - for iOS platform

In CLI , embedded system coding , to rewrite os, kernels, drivers , in designing api and microservices.(code has much similarity with C, CPP),in building web servers,games , allows safe handling of memory ,takes less memory to execute a task than that of other programming languages.

Ruby on rails

It's a web development framework use Ruby as its programming language to design web apps at the server site .Good for designing interactive websites and application for both Android and iOS .follows MVC architecture.it Is dynamically typed.
Airbnb , Shopify, GitHub used Ruby to built their platform.
